display.purpose: Hero and major section headings only.

label.purpose: Button text, badges, section eyebrows, form labels.

shadows.name: interactive
shadows.purpose: Hover/focus state on buttons and floating elements.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Used for quote requests, form submissions, and key navigation.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0000ee; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 10px; border: none; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0000ee; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Used for secondary CTAs like 'View Catalog'.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #5d5d5d; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0000ee; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Product catalog card and testimonial card.
components.html:
20 PÉS // ALMOXARIFADO

Container Almoxarifado Standard

Ideal para armazenamento seguro de ferramentas e insumos industriais.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #000000; border: 1px solid #5d5d5d; border-radius: 10px; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .ds-card-badge { display: inline-block; background: #18181b; color: #404040; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 5px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Track, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; margin: 0; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #404040; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form text input and select fields.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #18181b; border: 1px solid #5d5d5d; border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 15px; color: #ffffff; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0000ee; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #404040; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Sticky top navigation with links and CTA.
components.html: ModelosSimularFAQ
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; background: #000000; border-bottom: 1px solid #5d5d5d; padding: 15px 20px; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 40; } .ds-nav-link { color: #404040; padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 10px; text-decoration: none; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; transition: color 0.3s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #0000ee; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: FAQ Accordion
components.html: O prazo médio de fabricação é de 15 a 25 dias úteis.
components.css: .ds-faq { background: #000000; border: 1px solid #5d5d5d; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-faq-q { width: 100%; padding: 15px 20px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background: none; border: none; color: #ffffff; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; } .ds-faq-chevron { color: #404040; transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-faq-a { padding: 0 20px 15px; color: #404040; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview: A dark, robust, mechanical interface that communicates strength and reliability through honest materials and deliberate restraint. The palette is predominantly monochromatic with a single blue accent for interactivity. This is not a polished corporate site; it is a factory floor rendered in pixels.
keyCharacteristics: Dark theme throughout; no light mode
Monochromatic with a single high-saturation blue accent
Visible borders and defined surface separation
No glass, no blur, no gradient text, no decorative shadows

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The blue accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity communicates importance. A blue element that is not interactive is a design failure.

rules.name: The Two-Family Rule
rules.body: Track and Poppins are the only fonts permitted. No third family enters the system.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus) or for floating/overlay elements.

dos: Do use #0000ee for interactive elements only
Do use #18181b as bg and #000000 for surfaces
Do keep the accent rare - ≤10% of any screen
Do use Track for headings, Poppins for body
Do use borders to separate sections
Do use tonal layering over shadows for depth
donts: Don't introduce colors outside the palette
Don't use drop shadows on cards at rest
Don't make generic SaaS template designs
Don't use gradient text or border-left stripes
